description_long: This is a modern, rectangular briefcase with a sleek, dark exterior, likely made from synthetic fabric or nylon, giving it a water-resistant and durable appearance. The main body is smooth with subtle texturing on the front and back panels, and it features reinforced stitching along the seams. There are two sturdy, woven handles on the top, and an adjustable, padded shoulder strap attached diagonally across the back for versatile carrying options. The briefcase is equipped with a zipper closure running along the top edge, and a small, rectangular brand patch is visible on the front. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible external pockets or decorative elements, making it suitable for professional urban environments.
description: A sleek, dark-colored rectangular briefcase with woven handles, a padded shoulder strap, and a minimalist, professional design.
description_view_0: The back view shows the padded shoulder strap attached diagonally and the two woven handles on top.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the slim profile of the briefcase and the attachment points for the shoulder strap.
description_view_2: The front view displays the smooth, textured panel with a small brand patch and both handles clearly visible.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the zipper closure and the clean, uninterrupted surface of the briefcase.
attribute_handle_type: Two short, wide, woven fabric handles attached to the top with reinforced stitching; one long, adjustable, padded shoulder strap made of fabric and plastic hardware, attached with clips; all handles are flexible.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Zipper closure running along the top edge; no visible lock mechanism.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, rectangular brand patch is visible on the front panel, embossed with text.
